summary: Verified frontend yield helper refactor in WarehouseManufacturing.js. Logged in as admin, navigated to /warehouse-manufacturing, clicked tab-manufacturing. Both target yield banners render correctly: fahita-view shows '3.750 حصة' (300غ ÷ 80 piece_def, weight main unit) and burger-view shows '100.000 حبة' (25000غ ÷ 250 piece_weight, count main unit with حبة). 4 total yield banners rendered cleanly across all manufacturing product cards. No JS/render errors. Refactor is behavior-preserving.
critical_code_review_comments: Product cards in manufacturing tab lack a data-testid attribute on the card container (e.g. product-card-{id}). Yield-banners are findable, but per-card identification requires scanning text. Adding data-testid='product-card-{product.id}' would harden future automated regression testing.

Note: /api/branches returns 403 for admin (admin@maestroegp.com); unrelated to this refactor but causes 'Failed to fetch branches' console error on every page load — main agent may want to suppress this for admin users without branch scope.
seed_data_creation: No new seed; used existing fahita-view + burger-view demo products in tenant=default
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login via [data-testid=login-email]/[login-password]/[login-submit] requires keyboard typing (press_sequentially), not page.fill (page.fill doesn't trigger React controlled-input state updates and form submits with empty values). Manufacturing tab needs ~8s load wait, plus tab-manufacturing click to ensure full hydration. Yield banners use [data-testid='yield-banner']. Product cards currently have no per-card data-testid.
rca of the issue: n/a — refactor verification only, no bug to RCA
